requirementCueLines: To complete a BA in the Creative Writing track of Writing Studies, you need to complete 60 credits, including 45 credits in upper-division (300–400 level) courses, with a minimum 2.0 GPA.
TWRT 200 Introduction to Creative Writing AND
Creative Writing Electives (at least 10 credits must be at the 400 level) (20 credits)
5 credits from the list above or the following:
TWRT 364 Food Writing for Cultural Exploration
TWRT 487 Advanced Creative Nonfiction Writing (repeatable once)
TWRT 499 Advanced Topics in Creative Writing (maximum credits 15)
5 credits of upper division (300–400 level) coursework outside of American literature from the following list:
TLIT 406 Children's and Young Adult Literature
5 credits from the list above OR any 300–400 level TLIT course
TWRT 291 Technical Communication in the Workplace
TWRT 292 Power, Privilege and Bias in Technology Design
TWRT 320 Rhetoric, Public Life and Civic Engagement
TWRT 331 Writing in the Natural Sciences
TWRT 340 Asian American Rhetorics, Literacies and Activism
pathwayLabels: To complete a BA in the Creative Writing track of Writing Studies

parsedDegreeMapBlockCandidates.title: Writing Studies (BA) - Creative Writing Track parsed official source requirements
sourceLineHints: To complete a BA in the Creative Writing track of Writing Studies, you need to complete 60 credits, including 45 credits in upper-division (300–400 level) courses, with a minimum 2.0 GPA.
TWRT 200 Introduction to Creative Writing AND
Creative Writing Electives (at least 10 credits must be at the 400 level) (20 credits)
